title: MK Ultra Pottery Studio
shortDesc: Koh Samui's only pottery studio — wheel throwing, hand-building and glazing in a sensory-friendly space from age 7.
description: MK Ultra Artists is the island's only dedicated pottery studio offering wheel throwing, hand-building with slab technique, and pottery painting and glazing. The two-step process makes it a memorable experience: make your piece in class, then return to glaze it after firing (2–3 week turnaround — ideal for longer stays or expat families). Specifically noted as sensory-friendly and suitable for neurodivergent children. Reservations required.
priceNote: Firing + glazing from 350 THB per piece. Class fees on website.
